hero.headline: Systems that do not fall.
hero.subtitle: Focused on Backend and DevSecOps. Building fail-safe systems, from code to infrastructure.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.p1: I deliver applications that are fast, secure, and scalable. I work mainly with Java + Spring, PostgreSQL and distributed architectures with Cassandra.
about.p2: On the front, I use Next.js to create efficient interfaces that are integrated with my APIs. My style is hands-on engineering: automation, well-made pipelines, observability, and security from the first commit.
about.p3: Founder of house software focused on high performance backend and applied DevSecOps.
about.card_backend_desc: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Cassandra, Distributed Architecture
about.card_frontend_desc: Next.js, React, Efficient and Integrated Interfaces
about.card_engineering_desc: Performance, Simplicity, Continuous Delivery, Solid Systems

contact.title: Let’s talk?
contact.cta: If you have a critical system to build, I'm interested.
contact.description: Open for projects and opportunities in Backend, DevOps, DevSecOps and full-stack applications with Next.js.
